agents.name: Planner
agents.lastMessage: Enhancing SSTR2 selectivity by introducing aromatic residues at position 5 to be

report.hypothesis: Enhancing SSTR2 selectivity by introducing aromatic residues at position 5 to better complement SSTR2-unique ECL2/TM5 contacts, and hydrophobic residues at position 11 to avoid off-target SSTR3/SSTR5 interactions.

agents.name: Critic
agents.lastMessage: The current designs are achieving strong SSTR2 selectivity, but structural insta

report.hypothesis: The current designs are achieving strong SSTR2 selectivity, but structural instability is limiting the pass rate. Tightening structural constraints and increasing candidate diversity should improve the yield of high-quality, selective designs.

proposed_changes.rationale: Structural failures suggest excessive clashes in the designed peptides. Lowering the clash tolerance will enforce better geometry and improve structural quality.

The low pass rate (25%) indicates that the current number of candidates is insufficient to find high-quality designs. Increasing the number of candidates will improve the chances of identifying structurally stable and selective peptides.
